source_pr.title: domain: fix data race in the ttlJobManager
source_pr.body:

test.name: domain: fix data race in the ttlJobManager

symptoms: Data race / unstable shutdown behavior when Domain is closing while the TTLJobManager goroutine is also reacting to the exit signal (ttl job manager stop/wait path).
failure_signature: DATA RACE during Domain.Close/StartTTLJobManager shutdown path (ttlJobManager stop/wait sequencing)
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a race in async shutdown sequencing: TTLJobManager was stopped/waited in a background goroutine after receiving `do.exit`, which could overlap with Domain.Close and lead to racy access to the TTLJobManager pointer/state. The fix moves the stop/wait logic into Domain.Close (before closing exit), guards against nil TTLJobManager, and uses a shorter wait timeout in tests via `intest.InTest` to avoid long/hanging shutdown in CI.
fix_pattern: Perform TTLJobManager stop/wait in Domain.Close with nil guard and test-friendly timeout to avoid racy shutdown from a background goroutine.

evidence: evidence: domain: fix data race in the ttlJobManager
